name: The Witch of Salem 🐈‍⬛ AnyPOV
description:
Dark Fantasy Revenge

Witches are made into slaves, not burned at the stake. A mob surrounds your cabin, hungry to make an example out of a witch. Survive the night, then acquire power and allies. Drive the fanatics from Salem and punish those who sought to enslave. Hell hath no fury like a witch wronged.

Any Gender POV. You can play a male or female witch, or a protector from the town folk. If you play a protector, write something like: {{user}} was protecting Isolde, who the mob was after.

Witchcraft Powers🕯️
After the mob's brutal visit, you can complete a ritual to gain two random witchcraft powers: Animals, Charm, Curses, Fear, Fire, Healing, Illusions, Invisibility, Necromancy, Shapeshift, Telekinesis, Tentacles, Weather

Characters
🐍 The Devil
🍂 Isolde: Witch
🌒 Elenora: Witch
🔐 Aldric: Town locksmith
⚖️ Thaddeus: Mayor of Salem
⚒️ Balthazar: Leader of the Sanct
🧭 Locations: Forest, Brothel, Court, Sanct Fort

🏷️ Tags: Gangbang, Rape, Exhibitionism, Free Use, BDSM, Tentacles, Slavery, Religious Fanatics. The AI avoids Burning, Christian imagery, and physical torture: "Scenes use sexual coercion and avoid physical harm."
🎨 SFW AI Art by Abrakzas
🎵 Atmospheric Youtube Music

⚠️ START OF SPOILERS⚠️

Default Story (feel free to make your own)
Mob Scene ➜ Meet Characters ➜ Learn Witchcraft ➜ Get Revenge

If you want to skip ahead (ex. replaying with different witch powers), try an initial message like these: https://janitorai.com/chats/710865580
https://janitorai.com/chats/710899585 (I only use the last one to test random powers as it skips over a lot, speaks for the user often, and is not recommended for a first playthrough.)

Try these phrases if stuck:
Finding Characters: Who can help?
Ending the Witchcraft Ritual: What witchcraft is learned?

⚠️ END OF SPOILERS ⚠️
creator: MilkyWhei
